title: Kubelet Systemd Watchdog — Example Configuration
text:
[Unit]
Description
=
kubelet: The Kubernetes Node Agent
Documentation
=
https://kubernetes.io/docs/home/
Wants
=
network-online.target
After
=
network-online.target
[Service]
ExecStart
=
/usr/bin/kubelet
# Configures the watchdog timeout
WatchdogSec
=
30s
Restart
=
on-failure
StartLimitInterval
=
0
RestartSec
=
10
[Install]
WantedBy
=
multi-user.target
